skill-project-takeover.name: Project Takeover
skill-project-takeover.description: Read project structure, git status, AGENTS.md, and .ai/ memory. Generate a comprehensive context prompt for AI to understand the project.
skill-project-takeover.sourcePath: built-in: console.ps1 project status + project prompt
skill-project-takeover.usage: Select a registered project, then run takeover to generate project understanding context.

skill-code-audit.name: Code Audit
skill-code-audit.description: Inspect code changes, spot regressions, and summarize review findings for the current project.
skill-code-audit.usage: Apply when reviewing changes, assessing risks, or preparing a code review summary.

skill-architecture-analysis.name: Architecture Analysis
skill-architecture-analysis.description: Analyze the project structure, major flows, and implementation boundaries before a structural change.
skill-architecture-analysis.usage: Use when the task needs a stable view of the current architecture or module relationships.

skill-migration-analysis.name: Migration Analysis
skill-migration-analysis.description: Review historical migration knowledge and help map old structures to the current repository shape.
skill-migration-analysis.usage: Use when comparing old and new implementations or planning phased migration work.

skill-review-closeout.name: Review Closeout
skill-review-closeout.description: Summarize review outcomes, close out completed work, and capture the final decision trail.
skill-review-closeout.usage: Use at the end of a task or review cycle to prepare the closeout summary.

sop-market-localchange.name: Market Local Change
sop-market-localchange.description: Guide local market-facing changes with clear review points and controlled rollout steps.
sop-market-localchange.usage: Use as the step-by-step operating procedure for local change tasks.

sop-task-lifecycle.name: Task Lifecycle
sop-task-lifecycle.description: Standardize task creation, status transitions, review, and closeout behavior.
sop-task-lifecycle.usage: Use when a task needs a repeatable lifecycle from intake to close.

script-init-project-memory.name: Init Project Memory
script-init-project-memory.description: Initialize .ai project memory files from the repository templates.
script-init-project-memory.usage: Run when a project needs .ai/ memory bootstrapping.

script-sync-codex-home.name: Sync Codex Home
script-sync-codex-home.description: Synchronize the local Codex home configuration from the shared repository sources.
script-sync-codex-home.usage: Run when the local Codex home needs to be refreshed from the shared config.

script-console-cli.name: Console CLI
script-console-cli.description: Invoke the AI Coding Console command-line entry point for project and task operations.
script-console-cli.usage: Use for console help, project status, task lifecycle, and board commands.

script-gui-server.name: GUI Server
script-gui-server.description: Start the local HTTP GUI server for the three-column console workbench.
script-gui-server.usage: Use to launch the local GUI on port 3456.

prompt-git-branch-create.name: Git Branch Create
prompt-git-branch-create.description: A prompt template for creating a focused feature branch from a known project state.
prompt-git-branch-create.usage: Use when the work needs a clean branch setup prompt.

prompt-project-background.name: Project Background
prompt-project-background.description: A prompt template that assembles a stable project background from durable project knowledge.
prompt-project-background.usage: Use when the task needs a project-level context prompt.

prompt-multi-session-collab.name: Multi Session Collaboration
prompt-multi-session-collab.description: A prompt template for coordinating work across multiple sessions or handoffs.
prompt-multi-session-collab.usage: Use when a task requires cross-session coordination or handoff prompts.

prompt-mvp1-step-ui.name: MVP1 Step UI
prompt-mvp1-step-ui.description: A prompt template for step-based UI work on the MVP1 implementation path.
prompt-mvp1-step-ui.usage: Use when the task is about a step-driven UI change or staged workflow.
